description: CompositionYellow polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a tipped collar that has a striped inner and in-seam panel, branded buttons on a chest placket, half sleeves with ribbed hems and lee badge on right sleeve, lee branding printed on left chest pocket and shirt, and a vented hemFittingComfortWash careMachine wash in cold water inside out separatelyUse mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishmentsSoft and comfortable, this cotton polo t-shirt from Lee speaks volumes of its founder, Henry David Lee, and makes for a great semi-formal and casual wear. The chest pocket with a mock button and loop adds to its stylish edge. The ribbed sleeve hems accentuate your toned arms, while the vented hems offer a comfortable Fit. Team it with jeans and semi formal footwear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
